mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stu_test_record(stu_no, term, height, weight, bmi, score_total, warning_tag) VALUES(#{stuNo}, #{term}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{bmi}, #{scoreTotal}, #{warningTag})
mapper.update: UPDATE stu_test_record SET height = #{height}, weight = #{weight}, bmi = #{bmi}, score_total = #{scoreTotal}, warning_tag = #{warningTag} WHERE stu_no = #{stuNo} AND term = #{term}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM stu_test_record WHERE stu_no = #{stuNo} AND term = #{term}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM stu_test_record WHERE stu_no = #{stuNo} AND term = #{term}
SELECT * FROM stu_test_record ORDER BY term DESC, stu_no
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stu_test_record WHERE stu_no = #{stuNo}
